title: Space4Cities advances dynamic public-space management with partner cities
summary: The EUSPA-funded Space4Cities project progresses replicable solutions for dynamic management of urban public space across partner cities including Amsterdam and Guimaraes.
body: Space4Cities (Horizon Europe, EUSPA) is building space-data-based tools for the dynamic, agile management of urban public space — on the ground and in the air. The project brings together cities and regions across Europe to validate solutions and define a roadmap for Europe-wide implementation.
